targets.rawSql:
SELECT
	src_ip,
	SUM(bytes) AS total_bytes
FROM
	netflow.flows_local
WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND src_ip IN ($grafana_ip_src) AND dst_ip IN ($grafana_ip_dst)
GROUP BY
	src_ip
ORDER BY
	total_bytes DESC
LIMIT
	5

SELECT
	dst_ip,
	SUM(bytes) AS total_bytes
FROM
	netflow.flows_local
WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND src_ip IN ($grafana_ip_src) AND dst_ip IN ($grafana_ip_dst)
GROUP BY
	dst_ip
ORDER BY
	total_bytes DESC
LIMIT 5

panels.description: Calculate the total number of bytes for each ip_proto in the last 24 hours

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
	protocol,
	SUM(bytes) AS total_bytes
FROM
	netflow.flows_local
WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND src_ip IN ($grafana_ip_src) AND dst_ip IN ($grafana_ip_dst)
GROUP BY
	protocol
ORDER BY
	total_bytes DESC

panels.title: Total IP Protocols

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
	src_ip,
	timestamp,
	SUM(bytes) AS total_bytes
FROM
	netflow.flows_local
WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND src_ip IN ($grafana_ip_src) AND dst_ip IN ($grafana_ip_dst)
GROUP BY
	src_ip,
	timestamp
ORDER BY
  timestamp

SELECT
	dst_ip,
	timestamp,
	SUM(bytes) AS total_bytes
FROM
	netflow.flows_local
WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND src_ip IN ($grafana_ip_src) AND dst_ip IN ($grafana_ip_dst)
GROUP BY
	dst_ip,
	timestamp
ORDER BY
  timestamp

SELECT
	src_ip,
	timestamp,
	SUM(packets) AS total_packets
FROM
	netflow.flows_local
WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND src_ip IN ($grafana_ip_src) AND dst_ip IN ($grafana_ip_dst)
GROUP BY
	src_ip,
	timestamp
ORDER BY
  timestamp

SELECT
	dst_ip,
	timestamp,
	SUM(packets) AS total_packets
FROM
	netflow.flows_local
WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND src_ip IN ($grafana_ip_src) AND dst_ip IN ($grafana_ip_dst)
GROUP BY
	dst_ip,
	timestamp
ORDER BY
  timestamp

SELECT
    src_ip,
    SUM(bytes) AS total_bytes,
    SUM(packets) AS total_packets
FROM
    netflow.flows_local
WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND src_ip IN ($grafana_ip_src) AND dst_ip IN ($grafana_ip_dst)
GROUP BY
    src_ip
ORDER BY
	total_bytes DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT
    dst_ip,
    SUM(bytes) AS total_bytes,
    SUM(packets) AS total_packets
FROM
    netflow.flows_local
WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND src_ip IN ($grafana_ip_src) AND dst_ip IN ($grafana_ip_dst)
GROUP BY
    dst_ip
ORDER BY
	total_bytes DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT
	src_ip,
  protocol,
	dst_ip,
	SUM(bytes) AS total_bytes
FROM
	netflow.flows_local
WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND src_ip IN ($grafana_ip_src) AND dst_ip IN ($grafana_ip_dst)
GROUP BY
	src_ip,
  protocol,
	dst_ip
ORDER BY
	total_bytes DESC
LIMIT
	5

SELECT
	src_geo_latitude,
	src_geo_longitude,
	src_ip,
	SUM(bytes) AS src_total_bytes
FROM
	netflow.flows_local
WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND src_geo_latitude != 0
  AND src_ip IN ($grafana_ip_src) AND dst_ip IN ($grafana_ip_dst)
GROUP BY
	src_geo_latitude,
	src_geo_longitude,
	src_ip
ORDER BY
	src_total_bytes DESC
LIMIT
	100

SELECT
	dst_geo_latitude,
	dst_geo_longitude,
	dst_ip,
	SUM(bytes) AS dst_total_bytes
FROM
	netflow.flows_local
WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND dst_geo_latitude != 0
  AND src_ip IN ($grafana_ip_src) AND dst_ip IN ($grafana_ip_dst)
GROUP BY
	dst_geo_latitude,
	dst_geo_longitude,
	dst_ip
ORDER BY
	dst_total_bytes DESC
LIMIT
	100

panels.title: Traffic Map in VietNam Region by Source

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    src_ip,
    SUM(bytes) AS total_bytes,
    SUM(packets) AS total_packets
FROM
    netflow.flows_local
WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND src_ip IN ($grafana_ip_src) AND dst_ip IN ($grafana_ip_dst)
GROUP BY
    src_ip
ORDER BY
	total_bytes DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT
    dst_ip,
    SUM(bytes) AS total_bytes,
    SUM(packets) AS total_packets
FROM
    netflow.flows_local
WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND src_ip IN ($grafana_ip_src) AND dst_ip IN ($grafana_ip_dst)
GROUP BY
    dst_ip
ORDER BY
	total_bytes DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT * FROM netflow.flows_local 
WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  AND src_ip IN ($grafana_ip_src) AND dst_ip IN ($grafana_ip_dst)
ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1000

SELECT * 
FROM netflow.flows_local 
WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime
ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) as "time", count(*) 
FROM netflow.flows_local 
WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000
